title: $$2M Underwater Container Shelter With a Full River View
description: $$2M Underwater Container Shelter With a Full River View
prompt_text: A time-lapse video documenting the construction of a luxurious underwater living space. The process begins outdoors by a riverbank where an excavator digs a pit. A blue shipping container with large window cutouts is lowered into the pit and sealed. The scene transitions to the interior, where a man installs wood paneling, lighting, and a kitchen. The final result is a modern, cozy room featuring a bed and a dining area, with large windows providing a direct view into the river's aquatic life. The lighting evolves from natural outdoor light to warm, integrated indoor LEDs.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A time-lapse video documenting the construction of a luxurious underwater living space. The process begins outdoors by a riverbank where an excavator digs a pit. A blue shipping container with large window cutouts is lowered into the pit and sealed. The scene transitions to the interior, where a man installs wood paneling, lighting, and a kitchen. The final result is a modern, cozy room featuring a bed and a dining area, with large windows providing a direct view into the river's aquatic life. The lighting evolves from natural outdoor light to warm, integrated indoor LEDs.

cinematography.mood: Ambitious, industrious, and eventually serene and tranquil.
cinematography.cameraShot: A mix of wide outdoor shots, eye-level interior time-lapse shots, and a final close-up panning shot through the window underwater.

actions: An excavator digs a rectangular pit next to a river.
A crane lowers a modified blue shipping container into the water-filled pit.
A man attaches a round metal hatch to the top of the container.
The excavator backfills the area around the container with dirt.
Inside the container, a man installs wood panels on the ceiling and walls.
A man paints the interior and installs sleek LED lighting strips.
Furniture, including a bed and kitchen cabinets, is rapidly assembled in a time-lapse.
The camera pans close to the window, showing fish swimming in the river water outside.
dialogue: [Mechanical sounds of the excavator and crane]
[Splashing water as the container is lowered]
[Ambient underwater bubbling sounds during the final shot]
